question_text: Which statement about distance-time graphs is correct?

options.label: A
options.text: The gradient (slope) of a distance-time graph shows the acceleration

options.label: B
options.text: The gradient (slope) of a distance-time graph shows the speed

options.label: C
options.text: The gradient (slope) of a distance-time graph shows the distance

options.label: D
options.text: The gradient (slope) of a distance-time graph shows the time

explanation: On a distance-time graph, the steeper the slope (gradient), the faster the object is moving. A flat line means the object is stationary (not moving).
